name: slideless
description: Generate, share, and email HTML presentations with full asset support (images, video, 3D models, shaders). Decks are either a single self-contained HTML file or a folder with sibling assets; Slideless serves them like a static website. Bundles multiple visual styles with complete reference examples. Skills delegate to the official `slideless` CLI (npm package) for backend operations. Run `setup-slideless` first.
